channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GODAVARI] Godavari Drugs Ltd. Allots Convertible Warrants and Equity Shares Worth Rs. 44,11,72,995/- to Promoters and Non-Promoters
item.description:
Godavari Drugs Ltd. held a Board Meeting on 18.03.2026, where they approved the allotment of 23,60,065 convertible warrants and 25,96,935 equity shares on a preferential basis. The convertible warrants were issued to promoters at a price of Rs. 89/- each, amounting to Rs. 21,00,45,785/-. The company has received 25% of the Warrant Issue Price, i.e., Rs. 5,25,11,446.25/-. The equity shares were issued to promoters and non-promoters at an issue price of Rs. 89/- per share, amounting to Rs. 23,11,27,215/-. The total value of the allotted convertible warrants and equity shares is Rs. 44,11,72,995/-.

  • Godavari Drugs Ltd. allotted 23,60,065 convertible warrants worth Rs. 21,00,45,785/- to promoters.
  • The company has received 25% of the Warrant Issue Price, i.e., Rs. 5,25,11,446.25/-.
  • Godavari Drugs Ltd. allotted 25,96,935 equity shares worth Rs. 23,11,27,215/- to promoters and non-promoters.
  • The total value of the allotted convertible warrants and equity shares is Rs. 44,11,72,995/-.
  • The allotment was made pursuant to the In-Principle Approval granted by the BSE Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODAVARI DRUGS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SHYMINV] Shyamkamal Investments Ltd Appoints Ms. Aesha Harsh Shah as Non-Executive and Independent Director
item.description:
Shyamkamal Investments Ltd, with Security Id: SHYMINV and Code: 505515, held an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on Tuesday, 17th March, 2026, from 3:34 P.M to 3:50 P.M through Video Conferencing / Another Audio-Video Means. The scrutinizer for the meeting was GAURAV BACHANI from GAURAYV BACHANI & ASSOCIATES. The meeting was held to discuss the appointment of Ms. Aesha Harsh Shah as Non-Executive and Independent Director of the Company. The voting results were as follows: Promoters and Promoter group passed the resolution with 99.9997% of the votes in favor and 0.0003% against. The public, including institutions and non-institutions, also passed the resolution with 99.9997% of the votes in favor and 0.0003% against.

  • Shyamkamal Investments Ltd held an EGM on 17th March, 2026
  • Ms. Aesha Harsh Shah appointed as Non-Executive and Independent Director
  • Voting results: 99.9997% in favor, 0.0003% against

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHYAMKAMAL INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MOLDTEK] Mold-Tek Technologies Ltd Receives Demand Notice from Income Tax Department for AY 2024-25
item.description:
Mold-Tek Technologies Ltd, a company based in Hyderabad, India, has received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department, Ministry of Finance, Government of India for the Assessment Year 2024-25. The notice was received under Section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, and the demanded amount is Rs. 30,40,440 /-. The company is currently under the process of responding to the notice within the indicated timeframe. The company asserts that there are no violations or contravention of any provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961, and the order has no financial impact.

  • Mold-Tek Technologies Ltd received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department for the Assessment Year 2024-25.
  • The demanded amount is Rs. 30,40,440 /-.
  • The company is currently responding to the notice within the indicated timeframe.
  • The company asserts that there are no violations or contravention of any provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961.
  • The order has no financial impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOLD-TEK TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [CLEANMAX] Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd Changes Corporate Identification Number to L93090MH2010PLC208425
item.description:
Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd, a company limited by shares and non-government company, has changed its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) from 'U93090MH2010PLC208425' to 'L93090MH2010PLC208425'. This change has been made pursuant to the listing of the company's equity shares on National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. and BSE Limited on 02 March 2026. The status of the company has also been changed from ‘Unlisted’ to ‘Listed’ by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). The company's Master Data from the MCA website confirms these changes.

  • Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd changes Corporate Identification Number to L93090MH2010PLC208425
  • Change made pursuant to the listing of equity shares on National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. and BSE Limited
  • Company status changed from ‘Unlisted’ to ‘Listed’ by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA)
  • Changes confirmed by the company's Master Data from the MCA website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [BALKRISIND] HDFC Mutual Fund Acquires 2.005% Additional Shares in Balkrishna Industries Ltd.
item.description:
HDFC Mutual Fund has increased its shareholding in Balkrishna Industries Ltd. by 2.005%. As of March 16, 2026, the aggregate holding of the Schemes of HDFC Mutual Fund in the company is 9.161% of the paid up equity share capital. This acquisition was made through open market transactions.

  • HDFC Mutual Fund has increased its shareholding in Balkrishna Industries Ltd. by 2.005%.
  • As of March 16, 2026, the aggregate holding of the Schemes of HDFC Mutual Fund in the company is 9.161% of the paid up equity share capital.
  • This acquisition was made through open market transactions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALKRISHNA INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ASIANPAINT] Asian Paints Ltd. Receives Disclosure for Creation and Release of Encumbrance on Equity Shares
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for Sattva Holding and Trading Pvt Ltd. The disclosure pertains to the creation of encumbrance on 8,75,000 equity shares and the release of encumbrance on 28,50,000 equity shares of Asian Paints Limited. The encumbrance is for a collateral loan taken by the company. The notable shareholders involved in this transaction include Ba;al Finance Ltd, Rupen Choksi (Minor), SHAILESH CHIMANLAL CHOKSI HUF, SHAILESH CHIMANLAL CHOKSI, Hiren Holdings Private Limited, Upnishad Holdings Private Limited, ELF Trading and Chemical Manufacturing Private Limited, Vikatmev Containers Ltd, Dani Finlease Private Limited, MANISH MAHENDRA CHOKSI HUF, and ASHISH ASHWIN CHOKSI HUF.

  • Asian Paints Ltd. receives disclosure for creation and release of encumbrance on equity shares
  • Creation of encumbrance on 8,75,000 equity shares and release of encumbrance on 28,50,000 equity shares
  • Encumbrance is for a collateral loan taken by the company
  • Notable shareholders involved in the transaction include Ba;al Finance Ltd, Rupen Choksi (Minor), SHAILESH CHIMANLAL CHOKSI HUF, SHAILESH CHIMANLAL CHOKSI, Hiren Holdings Private Limited, Upnishad Holdings Private Limited, ELF Trading and Chemical Manufacturing Private Limited, Vikatmev Containers Ltd, Dani Finlease Private Limited, MANISH MAHENDRA CHOKSI HUF, and ASHISH ASHWIN CHOKSI HUF

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASIAN PAINTS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PIGL] Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd. Allots 5,43,531 Equity Shares Upon Conversion of Warrants
item.description:
Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd. has allotted 5,43,531 equity shares upon conversion of warrants to promoter and non-promoter at a price of Rs. 83.75/- including premium of Rs. 73.75/- per share on a preferential basis. This allotment has increased the company's paid-up equity capital from Rs. 20,32,53,690/- to Rs. 20,86,89,000/-. The allottees include Padmaraj P Pillai HUF, M/s Pulakeshin Private Limited, Sureshkumar Bansilal Shah, Manjulaben Shah, Manisha Vipulkumar Pathak, and Prakaash Sevantilal n Shah. The company had previously allotted 50,96,000 warrants, out of which 42,52,469 were converted into equity shares. The remaining 5,43,531 warrants were converted into equity shares upon request from the promoter and non-promoter.

  • Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd. allots 5,43,531 equity shares upon conversion of warrants.
  • The allotment was made to promoter and non-promoter at a price of Rs. 83.75/- per share.
  • This allotment has increased the company's paid-up equity capital from Rs. 20,32,53,690/- to Rs. 20,86,89,000/-.
  • The allottees include Padmaraj P Pillai HUF, M/s Pulakeshin Private Limited, Sureshkumar Bansilal Shah, Manjulaben Shah, Manisha Vipulkumar Pathak, and Prakaash Sevantilal n Shah.
  • The company had previously allotted 50,96,000 warrants, out of which 42,52,469 were converted into equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PIGL] Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd Approves Allotment of 5,43,531 Equity Shares
item.description:
Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd announced that its Board of Directors approved the allotment of 5,43,531 Equity Shares at a premium of Rs. 73.75/- per equity share. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 5,43,531 Convertible Warrants into equal number of Equity Shares on a preferential basis to Promoter and Non-promoter. This decision was made during a Board meeting held on March 18, 2026. The paid-up equity capital of the Company has increased from Rs. 20,32,53,690/- to Rs. 20,86,89,000/- as a result of this allotment.

  • Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd approved the allotment of 5,43,531 Equity Shares at a premium of Rs. 73.75/- per equity share.
  • The allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 5,43,531 Convertible Warrants into Equity Shares on a preferential basis to Promoter and Non-promoter.
  • The decision was made during a Board meeting held on March 18, 2026.
  • The paid-up equity capital of the Company has increased from Rs. 20,32,53,690/- to Rs. 20,86,89,000/- as a result of this allotment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PIGL] Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd: Padmaraj P Pillai HUF Acquires Shares via Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Padmaraj P Pillai HUF. The disclosure is regarding the allotment of equity shares upon conversion of warrants on Preferential Basis. The acquisition took place on March 16, 2026, following a Board meeting. The acquired shares represent 1.42% of the total diluted capital of the company.

  • Padmaraj P Pillai HUF acquires 3,00,000 shares, representing 1.42% of the total diluted capital of Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through preferential allotment.
  • The total share capital of the company is Rs. 20,32,53,690/- (2,03,25,369) Equity shares of Rs.10/- each.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 21,16,89,000/- (2,11,68,900) Equity shares of Rs.10/- each.
  • The acquisition was made on March 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SARTHAKIND] Maha Kosh Papers Pvt Ltd Sells Portion of Holding in Sarthak Industries Ltd
item.description:
Maha Kosh Papers Pvt Ltd, a Promoter Group of Sarthak Industries Ltd, has sold a portion of its holding in Sarthak Industries Ltd on 17.03.2026. The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The sale resulted in a decrease of 0.79% in Maha Kosh Papers Pvt Ltd's holding in Sarthak Industries Ltd.

  • Maha Kosh Papers Pvt Ltd, a Promoter Group of Sarthak Industries Ltd, sold a portion of its holding in Sarthak Industries Ltd.
  • The sale was made on 17.03.2026.
  • The sale resulted in a decrease of 0.79% in Maha Kosh Papers Pvt Ltd's holding in Sarthak Industries Ltd.
  • The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Sarthak Industries Ltd's equity share capital remains unchanged at Rs. 9,29,18,000 consisting of 92,91,800 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SARTHAK INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Sale
